---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
date: ""
---

```{r setup + data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)


turnout_all <- readRDS("~/Desktop/final-project-Smlfberry/data/turnout_all.rds")

state_avg <- turnout_all |>
  group_by(state) |>
  summarise(avg_turnout = mean(turnout_rate, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
   arrange(desc(avg_turnout))

```

```{r bar plot, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=5, out.width="100%"}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
state_avg <- turnout_all %>%
  group_by(state) %>%
  summarise(avg_turnout = mean(turnout_rate, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_turnout)) %>%
  mutate(state_full = case_when(
    state == "WI" ~ "Wisconsin",
    state == "MI" ~ "Michigan",
    state == "IL" ~ "Illinois",
    state == "OH" ~ "Ohio",
    state == "IN" ~ "Indiana"
  ))
p <- ggplot(state_avg, aes(x = avg_turnout, y = reorder(state_full, avg_turnout), 
                            fill = avg_turnout)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#c7e9e0", high = "#1a7a6e") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, family = "Georgia"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, family = "Georgia"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#faf9f6", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#faf9f6", color = NA)
  )
p

ggsave("Turnout_Bar.png", p)
```
